message:
style: apply linter formatting to telemetry.rs

Reformats lines exceeding the configured line width:
  - Expand single-line if/else to multi-line (collect(), min/max fields)
  - Break method chains across lines (latest(), histogram_count(),
    collect_system_memory parse chain)

No behavioral changes — formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
